rules.name: Strip SDXL-era tokens
rules.notes: These tokens are SDXL / midjourney-era. Gemini 2.5 Flash Image ignores them at best, gets distracted at worst.

rules.name: Normalize lens notation
rules.notes: '50 mm' → '50mm'. Gemini reads lens notation more reliably when tight.

rules.name: Add photoreal anchor
rules.value: Photoreal film still. Considered color grade, subtle film grain. No text, no watermarks.
rules.notes: Anchors Gemini toward cinematic photographic output when the prompt lacks it.

rules.name: Reinforce 'preserve everything else'
rules.value: Preserve composition, lighting, and character identity exactly; change only what the edit describes.
rules.notes: Edit mode drifts without this hint — Gemini tends to re-interpret the whole scene.

rules.name: Strip over-stylization on titles
rules.notes: Title cards need legible, minimal design. Artistic-style tokens hurt text rendering.

rules.name: Add legibility hint
rules.value: Minimal composition, high legibility, tight kerning. Photoreal with subtle grain.
rules.notes: Gemini handles text better with explicit legibility hints.

rules.name: Strip transition language
rules.notes: Seedance renders one continuous clip. Transition language confuses it — those happen between clips in ffmpeg.

rules.name: Strip sound / music cues
rules.notes: Seedance is silent. Sound cues waste prompt tokens.

rules.name: Strip generation-era tokens
rules.notes: Off by default — 'cinematic' sometimes helps Seedance. Enable if you notice the word isn't doing anything.

rules.name: Clamp motion prompt length
rules.notes: Community guidance: Seedance performs best at <60 words + constraints (~360-400 chars). Longer prompts dilute motion signal.

rules.name: Strip negative framing (will add banlist separately)
rules.notes: Inline negatives hurt — Seedance (community-tested) prefers a dedicated constraints clause at the end. We strip inline negatives and the banlist rule adds a proper one.

rules.name: Append constraints banlist (Seedance 5-part structure)
rules.value: Avoid visible text, watermarks, lens flares, malformed hands, or identity drift.
rules.notes: Per Seedance community guide: each shot benefits from an explicit 3-5 item banlist. This is the standard list that blocks the most common artifacts.

rules.name: Normalize camera motion phrasing
rules.notes: Off by default — some teams prefer 'push' over 'dolly'. Enable to standardize on Seedance's preferred vocabulary (dolly/track/crane/handheld/gimbal).

rules.name: Strip generic quality adjectives
rules.notes: Off by default. Google's guide calls these 'vague good/beautiful' anti-patterns. Enable if you notice Claude leaning on them.

rules.name: Strip negative framing ('no X', 'without Y')
rules.notes: Gemini guide: use positive framing ('empty street' not 'no cars'). Our photoreal-anchor rule already appends 'No text, no watermarks' positively.

rules.name: Wrap literal titles in quotes
rules.notes: Google guide: enclose rendered text in quotes for reliable typography. Matches all-caps words 4-32 chars (typical title length).
